Now when you would have gone through the rapid fire test and you would have activated your funnel, usually what you would have in place at this stage is some top of funnel activity. Well when we talk about building out a long tail funnel what we're actually talking about here is okay we've set up the initial funnel it's generating leads it's doing a good job. However we've got so many different people that we have warmed up or we have touched with our funnel at this stage that we're not really engaging and so if we can build out a long tail funnel and retarget all the different groups of people that have come in touch with our funnel we can incredibly increase the amount of leads that we get through and also reduce that cost per lead. ## [09:05 - 10:52]

think of the context here but you could offer them a top-up reminder hey don't forget to book in for your hairstyle use this code when you're on the phone with us etc etc and lastly another really important thing to think about is the website your clients website now it may not be getting a lot of traffic but you want to set up retargeting especially based on what people have been looking at on the website so typically speaking if we're looking at lead generation websites you're looking at maybe there's an FAQ or pricing page maybe there's packages maybe there's services maybe there's an about us so think of the reasons why would someone be looking at the services page right and then they didn't book so what can we do well we can run an ad that tells them like hey are you not sure which service is right for you send us a message today and you know and we'll respond to you and let you know what's best suited to you so that's kind of an example here on the left hand side as well you're not sure what package you need flick us a message with your ideal hairdo and we'll try to sort it out for you so think about why people would be visiting those specific pages make sure you're excluding those that did actually request you know go through and and and request an appointment and then yeah and and get creative get creative with the ads that you're running think about the objections that people are having and annihilate that with your copy and your ads so this is how to build out long tail funnels this is what you do once your existing funnel is working it's getting leads this is what you'll do to optimize the whole thing
